about_description: PatiMatch brings together everything you need for your furry friends in one place: finding matches, responsible adoption, and social interaction. You can discover nearby listings, create your own pet listings, chat safely with other users, and explore nearby services like vets and pet shops on the map.
register_no_email_hint: No email required. Sign up with your mobile number, name, province/district, and password. You can add an email later in your profile if you want.
forgot_password_description: Enter your email address and a password reset link will be sent.

privacy_intro: Your privacy is important to us. This page briefly explains what data we collect while you use PatiMatch, how we use that data, and what rights you have.
privacy_section_data_body: When you create an account we ask for your full name, mobile number, province/district, and password; email is optional (you can add it later in your profile). A username may be assigned for you. When you complete your profile you may add biography, location, and information about your pets (name, species, age, photos). Your in-app activity (listings, likes, favorites, messages) is also stored securely in our system.
privacy_section_usage_title: How do we use your data?
privacy_section_usage_body: We use the collected data to show match and adoption listings correctly, to provide you with relevant content, to keep your account secure, and to detect abuse. If you allow notifications, we only send notifications related to important in-app events.
privacy_section_sharing_body: We do not sell your personal data to third parties. Except where required by law, security, or suspected fraud, your data is not shared. Technical infrastructure providers (such as hosting and push notification services) may access the minimum data necessary to provide their services.
privacy_section_rights_body: You can update or delete your profile details and listings at any time. If you wish to close your account, you can contact us from within the app or through our support channels. Under applicable law, you may have the right to request access to, correction of, or deletion of your data.
privacy_section_contact_body: For questions or requests about privacy, you can contact us through the "Contact Us" area inside the app or using the contact details you added to your profile.
privacy_last_updated: This privacy notice may be updated from time to time. Last updated: 2026.
